name: ContextMenuRoot
description: Root controller for a right-click context menu.
whenToUse: Contextual actions triggered by right-click (file operations, text formatting).
avoidWhen: Button-triggered menus - use Menu. Page navigation - use NavigationMenu.
accessibilityRequirements: ContextMenuContent requires aria-label or aria-labelledby. Arrow keys navigate items.

onclose.description: Called when context menu is dismissed.

parts.name: ContextMenuTrigger
parts.description: Area that opens the ContextMenu on right-click.

parts.name: ContextMenuContent
parts.description: Container for ContextMenuItems. Positioned at cursor.
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Must have aria-label or aria-labelledby (enforced by ModalLabelProps type).

parts.name: ContextMenuItem
parts.description: Single action item in a ContextMenu.
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Must have visible text content or aria-label.

parts.name: ContextMenuSeparator
parts.whenToUse: Separating groups of related menu items.

parts.name: ContextMenuLabel
parts.description: Label for a group of ContextMenu items.
parts.whenToUse: Grouping related menu items with a descriptive label.

inset.description: Align label with menu items that have icons.

parts.name: ContextMenuSub
parts.description: Root controller for a nested submenu within a ContextMenu.

open.description: Controlled open state for the submenu. Bindable.

parts.name: ContextMenuSubTrigger
parts.description: Trigger item that opens a ContextMenuSub submenu.
parts.whenToUse: Inside ContextMenuContent to create a nested submenu.
parts.accessibilityRequirements: Automatically has aria-expanded and aria-haspopup attributes.

parts.name: ContextMenuSubContent
parts.whenToUse: Inside ContextMenuSub, containing ContextMenuItems for the nested menu.

examples.title: Right-Click Menu
examples.code:
Right-click this area
Actions console.log("Edit")}>Edit console.log("Copy")}>Copy console.log("Paste")}>Paste Share console.log("Email")}>Email console.log("Message")}>Message console.log("Copy Link")}>Copy Link Disabled Item console.log("Delete")}>Delete
